title: Sashiko Now Providing AI Reviews On Rust Code For The Linux Kernel - Phoronix
description: Sashiko Now Providing AI Reviews On Rust Code For The Linux Kernel Phoronix An AI bug detection system called 'Sashiko' has been developed by a Google employee. Named after the Japanese embroidery technique 'sashiko,' it has been successfully detecting previously undiscovered bugs in the Linux kernel. GIGAZINE

title: Why helium shortages could slow down AI chip manufacturing worldwide
description: Iran's attacks on Qatar's natural gas infrastructure have disrupted global helium supplies, threatening semiconductor manufacturing, medical imaging and space industries worldwide.

title: Mental health experts warn AI therapy tools can reinforce harmful thinking
description: Mental health clinicians warn that AI therapy tools can reinforce harmful thinking by mirroring users' own words instead of challenging them. Privacy risks add to the concern, as chat data may feed AI training without users knowing.

title: KT Holds Tech Workshop with Seoul National, KAIST to Boost AI Leadership
description: KT is strengthening its practical AI competitiveness by applying artificial intelligence research outcomes to actual services, bridging technology and business.
